title: SEA2SEE PARTICIPATIVE PROTOCOL MANUAL
author: Maggioni, Tecla
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This manual gives a brief introduction to the Sea2See Participation Protocol under WP2, and then outlines each of the participation tasks that must be completed by partners involved in Subtask 2.1.2. A number of worksheets and checklists are also provided in the tools section.  

  This Participation Protocol Learning Manual was adapted from the original publication Ocean Literacy Co-Creation Participation Protocol, Devaney, M., Domegan, C., McHugh, P. B. Broome, M. Hogan and Piwowarczyk, J. (2015) The Sea Change Participation Protocols Learning Manual. EU Sea Change Project. 
Given the similarities in terms of consultation objectives and dynamics, this protocol was thought to be a good fit for the Sea2See project.
